genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 July 2025

species.citation: (L.) Greene , Pittonia 4 (1899) 46 ; Yang et al., Fl. Taiwan ed. 2, 4 (1998) 421; Romeroso et al., Asian J. Biol. Life Sc. 10 (2021) 439; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 990; ≡ Lippia nodiflora (L.) Michx. , Fl. Bor.-Amer. (Michaux) 2 (1803) 15 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 398; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 381; ≡ Verbena nodiflora L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 20. var. nodiflora. Notes: Throughout the Philippines, possibly represented by native and naturalized lineages (Gross et al. 2017). Low and medium elevations, common weed in open waste places. Cryptogenic.
species.distribution: BATAN, HOMONHON, LEYTE, LUZON: Cagayan (photos), Cavite, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, NCR, Rizal, MINDANAO: Maguindanao del Sur, PANAY, SAMAR (photos), SIARGAO.
species.notes: Widely distributed in the warmer regions of the World. 0m.
